title: Why did the writer become very worried?

meanings.usage: 指治疗牙齿疾病的专业医生
指用力将某物从某处拔出，如拔牙、拔刺等
指用于止血或擦拭的棉花，在牙科中用于塞在拔牙处止血
指系统地收集某物作为爱好，如收集邮票、硬币、火柴盒等
装火柴的小盒子，也是收藏家喜欢收藏的物品
用于描述两件事同时发生
人体口腔中的器官，用于品尝和说话
指仔细查找某物或某人
指对某事感到不安或焦虑
指将某物从原位置移走或取下
用头部上下运动表示同意、问候或确认
描述不寻常的或让人感到奇怪的事物
指物体上的凹陷或开口处
指停止工作或活动以恢复体力

examples.en: The dentist pulled out one of my teeth.
examples.zh: 牙医拔掉了我的一颗牙。

examples.en: He pulled out a pen from his pocket.
examples.zh: 他从口袋里掏出一支笔。

examples.en: In answer to these questions I either nodded or made strange noises.
examples.zh: 作为对这些问题的回答，我要么点头，要么发出奇怪的声音。

examples.en: She smiled in answer to his question.
examples.zh: 她微笑着回答他的问题。

examples.en: My tongue was busy searching out the hole where the tooth had been.
examples.zh: 我的舌头正忙着找出拔掉牙齿的那个洞。

examples.en: He searched out the information he needed.
examples.zh: 他找到了他需要的信息。

examples.en: When the dentist at last removed the cotton wool from my mouth...
examples.zh: 当牙医终于从我嘴里取出棉球时...

examples.en: At last, the bus arrived.
examples.zh: 公交车终于来了。

examples.en: I was able to tell him that he had pulled out the wrong tooth.
examples.zh: 我终于能告诉他他拔错了牙。

examples.en: She was able to speak three languages.
examples.zh: 她能说三种语言。

examples.en: I either nodded or made strange noises.
examples.zh: 我要么点头，要么发出奇怪的声音。

examples.en: The machine made strange noises.
examples.zh: 这台机器发出奇怪的声音。

examples.en: My tongue was busy searching out the hole.
examples.zh: 我的舌头正忙着找出那个洞。

examples.en: She is busy writing her report.
examples.zh: 她正忙着写报告。

phrases.usage: 让别人做某事（使役结构）

examples.en: The dentist had just pulled out one of my teeth.
examples.zh: 牙医刚刚拔掉了我的一颗牙。

examples.en: I had my hair cut yesterday.
examples.zh: 我昨天理发了。

examples.en: I was able to tell him that he had pulled out the wrong tooth.
examples.zh: 我能够告诉他他拔错了牙。

examples.en: She told me that she was coming.
examples.zh: 她告诉我她要来了。

examples.en: I suddenly felt very worried, but could not say anything.
examples.zh: 我突然感到非常担心，但说不出话来。

examples.en: I couldn't understand what he meant.
examples.zh: 我不明白他的意思。

grammar.title: 过去进行时 (Past Continuous Tense)
grammar.definition: 表示在过去某一时刻或时间段正在进行的动作
grammar.usage: 用于描述过去正在发生的动作，常与 when, while 等连用

examples.en: My tongue was busy searching out the hole where the tooth had been.
examples.zh: 我的舌头正忙着找出拔掉牙齿的那个洞。

examples.en: It was raining when we left home.
examples.zh: 我们离家时天正在下雨。

examples.en: While I was sleeping, someone stole my car.
examples.zh: 当我睡觉的时候，有人偷了我的车。

grammar.title: 过去完成时 (Past Perfect Tense)
grammar.definition: 表示在过去某一时间之前已经完成的动作，即'过去的过去'
grammar.structure: 主语 + had + 过去分词
grammar.usage: 用于描述在叙述过去事件时，更早发生的动作

examples.en: The dentist had just pulled out one of my teeth.
examples.zh: 牙医刚刚拔掉了我的一颗牙。

examples.en: I realized I had left my keys at home.
examples.zh: 我意识到我把钥匙落在家里了。

examples.en: She told me she had finished her homework.
examples.zh: 她告诉我她已经完成了作业。

grammar.title: have something done (使役结构)
grammar.definition: 让别人做某事或遭遇某种情况
grammar.structure: 主语 + have + 宾语 + 过去分词
grammar.usage: 表示主语承受某种动作或经历，常用于医疗、服务等场合

examples.en: The dentist had just pulled out one of my teeth.
examples.zh: 牙医刚刚给我拔了一颗牙。

examples.en: I had my hair cut yesterday.
examples.zh: 我昨天理发了。

examples.en: She had her bag stolen on the bus.
examples.zh: 她在公交车上被人偷了包。

sentencePatterns.pattern: 主语 + have/has + something + 过去分词

original.en: The dentist had just pulled out one of my teeth.
original.zh: 牙医刚刚拔掉了我的一颗牙。

imitations.en: I had my car repaired yesterday.
She had her photo taken at the studio.

sentencePatterns.pattern: When/While + 主语 + was/were + doing..., 主语 + did...

original.en: When the dentist at last removed the cotton wool from my mouth, I was able to tell him...
original.zh: 当牙医终于从我嘴里取出棉球时，我能够告诉他...

imitations.en: When I arrived home, it was raining.
imitations.zh: 当我到家时，天正在下雨。

imitations.en: While she was cooking, the phone rang.
imitations.zh: 她做饭的时候，电话响了。

sentencePatterns.pattern: 主语 + could/couldn't + 动词原形

original.en: I suddenly felt very worried, but could not say anything.
original.zh: 我突然感到非常担心，但说不出话来。

imitations.en: I couldn't answer the question because it was too difficult.
imitations.zh: 我回答不了这个问题，因为它太难了。

imitations.en: She could speak three languages when she was ten.
imitations.zh: 她十岁时就能说三种语言。

sentencePatterns.pattern: In answer to + 名词/问题, 主语 + 动词...

original.en: In answer to these questions I either nodded or made strange noises.
original.zh: 作为对这些问题的回答，我要么点头，要么发出奇怪的声音。

imitations.en: In answer to your letter, I would like to say thank you.
imitations.zh: 作为对你来信的回复，我想说声谢谢。

imitations.en: In answer to his question, she shook her head.
imitations.zh: 作为对他问题的回答，她摇了摇头。
